questions.text: Does the vendor enforce MFA for all privileged access?
questions.notes: SSO with enforced MFA via Okta

questions.text: Are access reviews conducted at least quarterly?
Is role-based access control (RBAC) implemented across all systems?
Is customer data classified and labelled according to sensitivity?
questions.notes: No formal classification scheme in place

questions.text: Are data retention and deletion policies documented and enforced?
Does the vendor maintain a data inventory or data flow map?
questions.notes: Inventory exists for production only; dev/staging undocumented

questions.text: Is personal data processing compliant with applicable privacy regulations (GDPR/CCPA)?
questions.notes: DPO appointed, GDPR compliance program active

questions.text: Is all customer data encrypted at rest using AES-256 or equivalent?
questions.notes: Some legacy volumes use default encryption only

questions.text: Is TLS 1.2+ enforced for all data in transit?
Are encryption keys managed via a dedicated KMS/HSM?
questions.notes: Keys stored alongside data in some non-production environments

questions.text: Is there a documented key rotation policy with a maximum 90-day rotation window?
questions.notes: Policy exists but rotation not automated

questions.text: Does the vendor have a documented incident response plan?
Are incident response tabletop exercises conducted annually?
Does the vendor maintain 24/7 security monitoring with defined SLAs?
Is there a documented breach notification process (<72 hours)?
Is there a documented and tested business continuity plan?
Are RTO and RPO defined for all critical systems?
Does the vendor maintain geographically diverse disaster recovery sites?
Are backups tested for restore capability at least quarterly?
Does the vendor assess security posture of their own sub-processors?
questions.notes: Assessment performed at onboarding only, no ongoing monitoring

questions.text: Are sub-processor dependencies disclosed and updated in contract schedules?
Does the vendor maintain a supplier risk register?
Does the vendor hold a current SOC 2 Type II report?
Is the vendor ISO 27001 certified?
Are regular penetration tests performed by an independent third party?
Does the vendor have a documented vulnerability disclosure program?
questions.notes: Security.txt exists but no formal bug bounty

questions.text: Is the vendor PCI DSS certified? (if handling cardholder data)
questions.notes: Vendor does not process payment card data

top_risks: [DataProtection] Is customer data classified and labelled according to sensitivity?
[DataProtection] Are data retention and deletion policies documented and enforced?
[Encryption] Is all customer data encrypted at rest using AES-256 or equivalent?
[Encryption] Are encryption keys managed via a dedicated KMS/HSM?
remediation_checklist: [DataProtection] Is customer data classified and labelled according to sensitivity? — Vendor response was NO. Require remediation plan with committed timeline before contract signing.
[DataProtection] Are data retention and deletion policies documented and enforced? — Vendor response was NO. Require remediation plan with committed timeline before contract signing.
[DataProtection] Does the vendor maintain a data inventory or data flow map? — Vendor response was PARTIAL. Request evidence of partial implementation and gap-closure roadmap.
[Encryption] Is all customer data encrypted at rest using AES-256 or equivalent? — Vendor response was NO. Require remediation plan with committed timeline before contract signing.
[Encryption] Are encryption keys managed via a dedicated KMS/HSM? — Vendor response was NO. Require remediation plan with committed timeline before contract signing.
[Encryption] Is there a documented key rotation policy with a maximum 90-day rotation window? — Vendor response was PARTIAL. Request evidence of partial implementation and gap-closure roadmap.
[IncidentResponse] Are incident response tabletop exercises conducted annually? — Vendor response was PARTIAL. Request evidence of partial implementation and gap-closure roadmap.
[BCP] Are RTO and RPO defined for all critical systems? — Vendor response was PARTIAL. Request evidence of partial implementation and gap-closure roadmap.
[BCP] Does the vendor maintain geographically diverse disaster recovery sites? — Vendor response was NO. Require remediation plan with committed timeline before contract signing.
[SupplierMgmt] Does the vendor assess security posture of their own sub-processors? — Vendor response was PARTIAL. Request evidence of partial implementation and gap-closure roadmap.
[SupplierMgmt] Does the vendor maintain a supplier risk register? — Vendor response was NO. Require remediation plan with committed timeline before contract signing.
[Compliance] Does the vendor have a documented vulnerability disclosure program? — Vendor response was PARTIAL. Request evidence of partial implementation and gap-closure roadmap.
